subtitle: Developing smart and scalable solutions that turn complex challenges into efficient, high-performance systems.

about-me.title: About me
about-me.text: Hi! I’m Nathan, a Full Stack developer passionate about technology and creating solutions that make a difference. My journey began in 2022, when I had my first contact with programming during a technical computing course. Since then, I’ve been continuously learning and growing as a developer, with around three years of study and two years of real-world experience. I enjoy understanding how things work behind the code and turning ideas into something functional and well structured. I’m always looking to improve, learning new technologies, refining my skills, and exploring different ways to solve problems simply and effectively.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.description: A brief overview of my professional journey and the roles I've taken on.

jobs.description: At Nexa Roofing, I automated internal workflows using n8n, Airtable, and Glide, improving lead management, interview processes, reporting, and data consistency. I worked on restructuring complex databases, eliminating redundancies, and creating automated pipelines that reduced errors and manual effort.

Front-end: Built and refined UI components, enhanced responsiveness, and optimized performance with React Query. Integrated crypto wallets (Telegram Wallet, Tonkeeper) and improved DApp user flows. Delivered better UX through in-app feedback systems and resolved bugs across wallet integration, chats, and UI/UX. Back-end: Optimized SQL queries for features like user rankings and lobbies. Contributed to microservices development, including a payout system on the TON blockchain. Supported real-time and automated features, debugging backend components such as bots.

Developed core services for an omnichannel platform supporting 15+ companies concurrently. Designed data models and system architecture for multiple clients. Implemented real-time communication via WebSockets, reducing message latency by ~50%. Improved system performance by ~40% using Redis caching and asynchronous processing with RabbitMQ. Automated internal processes, reducing manual work by ~55%.

items.title: ETF Web Scraper & REST API
items.description: A web scraper and REST API for extracting real-time data from ETFs (Exchange-Traded Funds) on TrackingDifferences.com.

items.title: EtherWatch Backend
items.description: Backend for EtherWatch, providing real-time data from the Ethereum network via REST and WebSocket. Includes pending transaction streaming, MetaMask authentication, validation with Zod, and Docker support.

items.title: EtherWatch Frontend
items.description: Frontend application for monitoring the Ethereum network, providing real-time gas prices, market data, blockchain information, and live pending transactions via WebSockets. Supports MetaMask integration for transactions and balance checks.

items.title: EngliBot
items.description: A WhatsApp bot for learning English through games, slang, and phrases, featuring a personal vocabulary system. It helps users expand vocabulary, practice grammar, learn real-world English, and build a personal dictionary.

items.title: PWA Notes
items.description: A Progressive Web App for sharing notes directly between devices using WebRTC.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.text: I'm always open to new opportunities and interesting projects. Get in touch!
contact.name: Your Name
